extra.message: Certificate verification is disabled by setting verify to False in requests.get. This may lead to Man-in-the-middle attacks.
Running the application in debug mode (debug flag is set to True in run) is a security risk if the application is accessible by untrusted parties.
jinja2.Template is called with no autoescape argument (autoescaping is disabled by default). This increases the risk of Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks.
